hero.title: A1 Motor Park
hero.subtitle: 3.91 km · 15 turns · 25 pit boxes · 585 m altitude
hero.intro: Bulgaria's first FIA-homologated circuit, opened 21 March 2026 in Samokov.

facilities.title: Facilities
facilities.subtitle: 14 points of interest, from the main gate to the paddock.

about.title: About A1 Motor Park
about.body: A1 Motor Park is the first fully FIA-homologated circuit on the Balkan Peninsula. Set at the foot of the Rila mountains near Samokov, 3.91 km long with 15 turns, it is the new home of Bulgarian motorsport.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: Reach us for information, partnerships, or track rentals.
contact.formIntro: Send us a message and we'll get back to you shortly.
contact.formSuccess: Thanks — we'll be in touch shortly.

partners.title: Partners & sponsors
partners.intro: The A1 Motor Park family — the teams, clubs and brands racing with us through 2026 and beyond. Click any logo to visit.

upcomingEvents.title: Upcoming events
upcomingEvents.subtitle: What's headed to the track next.

pastEvents.title: Past events
pastEvents.subtitle: What the track has already seen this season.

trackDays.title: Open track days
trackDays.intro: Drive at your own pace on Bulgaria's first FIA Grade 3 circuit. Minimum 6 sessions × 18-20 minutes depending on the number of participants.

card.autoDescription: Open day Auto at A1 Motor Park is the open-track format on the newest and only FIA & FIM certified circuit in Bulgaria. Drive your own car at your own pace on a wide-open track.
card.motoDescription: Open day Moto at A1 Motor Park is the open-track format on the newest and only FIA & FIM certified circuit in Bulgaria. Ride your own bike at your own pace on a wide-open track.

before.heading: Before you arrive
before.i1: Each participant must hold a valid driver's licence for the vehicle they bring.
before.i2: Download the disclaimer; bring it filled in to reception.
before.i4: The vehicle must be in good technical condition.
before.i6: No own machine? Get in touch — rentals are available.

included.heading: What's included
included.i3: Marshals on track throughout the event.
included.i5: Access to café, restaurant and complex amenities.

cookies.title: This site uses cookies
cookies.body: We use cookies to improve site functionality and analyse traffic anonymously. You can accept all of them, or just the ones essential for the site to work.

intro.heading: Introduction
intro.body: A1 Motor Park ('we', 'us', 'our website') is committed to protecting your personal data. This policy explains what data we collect, how we use it and what rights you have in relation to its processing. The policy is aligned with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR) and applicable Bulgarian legislation.

data.heading: What data we collect
data.body: When you submit an enquiry through our contact form we collect the information you voluntarily share — name, email address and the contents of your message. While you browse the site, technical data such as IP address, browser type and access timestamps are also logged for security and maintenance. We do not knowingly collect data from children under the age of 14 without parental consent.

cookies.heading: Cookies
cookies.body:
The site uses two categories of cookies:

· Essential — required for basic operation (storing your language preference, the consent banner state, etc.).
· Analytics — let us measure traffic anonymously and improve content. These cookies are activated only if you have explicitly given consent through the banner shown on your first visit.

You can withdraw your consent at any time by clearing the cookies from your browser settings.

usage.heading: How we use the information

sharing.heading: Sharing with third parties
sharing.body: We do not sell or rent your personal data. We may share limited information with trusted technical partners (hosting provider, email service provider, analytics platform) who process it on our behalf and are bound by contractual confidentiality obligations. We may also disclose data when required to do so by Bulgarian or European authorities.

security.heading: Security
security.body: We apply reasonable technical and organisational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorised access, alteration, disclosure or destruction — including HTTPS encryption of traffic and access controls on our systems. However, no online platform can guarantee 100% security and we cannot be held responsible for incidents beyond our reasonable control.

rights.heading: Your rights

changes.heading: Changes to this policy
changes.body: This policy may be updated when changes in legislation, our services or the operation of the site require it. The current version is always available on this page, with the updated date at the top. For significant changes, we will notify you with a visible notice on the site.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.body:
For questions about how we process your personal data, or to exercise rights under GDPR, write to us:

E-mail: info@a1motorpark.com
Phone: +359 882 323 232
Address: A1 Motor Park, Samokov, Bulgaria
